description: Use bcWebCam to scan the MAC address barcode from a network switch label presented on the camera. The OBS Virtual Camera is broadcasting a label with a continuous 12-character MAC address (e.g., F8B156D92A14). Format the scanned string into standard MAC notation (with colons, e.g., F8:B1:56:D9:2A:14) and append a valid ISC DHCP reservation for it into 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dhcp_reservations.conf'. The host should be named 'Switch-IDF-02' and the fixed-address should be '10.1.20.5'. Save a screenshot of the successful bcWebCam scan to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scan_evidence.png'.
